replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: Thank you for sharing such a wonderful travel memory. It sounds like you experienced Colombia in a very real and meaningful way, from Popayán to Medellín and even the cable car ride up into the hillside neighborhoods. Medellín’s transformation and its flower culture are truly impressive, and the Flower Festival is one of the things that shows the city’s bright spirit. Colombia’s flower industry is also a beautiful side of the country that many people don’t know about.

replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: I understand what you mean. Some parts of Colombia can look very difficult from the outside, and life there is not always easy. But many people still stay because of family, culture, opportunity, and a deep love for their home. Colombia has challenges, but it also has strong people, beautiful traditions, and incredible resilience.
